channel.title: Technology - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

  3. "We were turned into a joke from minute one" - fired Highguard developer reflects on game's ill-fated launch and "false assumptions" after Game Awards reveal  Eurogamer
  4. Highguard Dev Breaks Silence After Website Shutdown – Promises More Updates  VICE
  5. UPDATE: Highguard Developer Wildlight Entertainment Confirms Layoffs At The Studio  Game Informer

item.title: Acer and ASUS take their Germany websites offline, customers locked out of official downloads - VideoCardz.com
item.description:
1. Acer and ASUS take their Germany websites offline, customers locked out of official downloads  VideoCardz.com
  2. Acer and Asus halt PC and laptop sales in Germany amid H.265 codec patent dispute — Nokia wins patent ruling, forcing tech giants to license HEVC codec  Tom's Hardware
  3. ASUS to Continue Support for PCs and Notebooks in Germany Despite Sales Ban  TechPowerUp
  4. It's just become harder to update drivers and bios in Germany as Acer and Asus' websites are down  PC Gamer
  5. Acer and Asus have stopped support for laptops in German patent dispute described as a 'tire fire of monstrous proportions'  TechRadar

item.title: ‘This Time It’s Different,’ Says Daniel Ives About Apple Stock (AAPL) - TipRanks
item.description:
1. ‘This Time It’s Different,’ Says Daniel Ives About Apple Stock (AAPL)  TipRanks
  2. Ignore the Panic and Keep Buying Apple Stock, According to Wedbush  Yahoo Finance
  3. New Siri Runs Into Problems, Features Could Be Pushed to iOS 26.5 and iOS 27  MacRumors
  4. Apple's AI 'soap opera' is finally ending, analyst says  qz.com
  5. Apple’s Latest Attempt to Launch New Siri Runs Into Snags  Bloomberg.com

item.title: Pokémon Pokopia Sped Through Development Thanks To Some Good Old Collaboration - Nintendo Life
item.description:
1. Pokémon Pokopia Sped Through Development Thanks To Some Good Old Collaboration  Nintendo Life
  2. What is Pokopia? Inside the calming Pokémon game that ditches battles for gardening  The Guardian
  3. All Confirmed Pokemon in Pokopia  IGN
  4. Pokopia: Game Freak on how Ruby and Sapphire inspired Pokémon’s biggest ever spin-off  Video Games Chronicle
  5. All Pokémon Pokopia Pre-Order Bonuses & Prices, Explained  Insider Gaming
